rationale: Trump's claimed Iran settlement is a fresh, concrete policy event with immediate market impact and direct implications for US military posture and oil prices — tangible for American residents.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran 'great settlement', cancels strikes, markets surge
top_events.summary: Stock markets rallied sharply; potential end to Iran nuclear standoff affects oil prices, US military deployment risk, and domestic political narrative directly.
